angle_reasoning.description: Why this angle was chosen. Reference specific evidence. 2-3 sentences max.

copy_expertise.description: 1-2 words. The field or discipline. Slots into: your level of ___ expertise

copy_client_descriptor.description: 1-2 words. Simple plural noun. Slots into: most experts selling to ___

copy_business_descriptor.description: 1-2 words. Professional identity plural. Slots into: most ___ I speak to

copy_hook.description: Max 8 words starting with 'when you're busy'. Slots into: ___, your own pipeline tends to run on whatever time is left over

personalised_line.description: 1-2 sentences referencing something specific about this person. Uses hedge language. Goes between opening and pain paragraph in the email.

offer_positioning.description: One sentence on how to position the offer for this specific person

intent_score.description: 0-100. Acquisition gap (0-30) + business stage (0-20) + offer fit (0-20) + personalisation quality (0-15) + content gap (0-15)

research_summary.description: 2-3 sentences summarising what you found and how approachable this prospect is
